name: native-select-demo
visual_summary: A native-looking dropdown select element, useful for situations when a developer wants to adhere to the native UI conventions of the browser or platform. This component is ideal for dropdown menu selections where the user is picking an item from a list, such as choosing a date, time, or options.
generation_prompt:
Create a production-ready form component with the following characteristics:

Name: native-select-demo
Description: A native-looking dropdown select element, useful for situations when a developer wants to adhere to the native UI conventions of the browser or platform. This component is ideal for dropdown menu selections where the user is picking an item from a list, such as choosing a date, time, or options.
Style: 
Interactions: clickable
Tags: dropdown, native, select

Requirements:
- Works in React with TypeScript by default but adaptable to Vue, Svelte, or plain HTML/CSS
- Uses Tailwind CSS for styling
- Fully accessible with ARIA labels and keyboard navigation
- Responsive and mobile-friendly
- No external dependencies beyond React and Tailwind unless necessary
- Include all necessary imports
- Export as default with sensible prop types

Generate clean production-ready code only. No explanations.
